narrative:
Canton Twp 5 (precinct in Stark County) has 778 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
